mano_cua.result_summary: Space Age模式下设置Scrap输入(8条turbo belt, 4堆叠)并Maximize Copper Plate后，solver报告unbounded错误：先后提示Calcite和Pipe to ground配方导致无限。添加这两个配方的Limit(8 machines)后仍报unbounded。将Limit设为0也无法解决。Factory显示Failed，0 of 0结果。Maximize功能在此配置下无法产出合理生产链。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Maximize copper plate with scrap input shows unbounded error. Solver flags Calcite and Pipe to ground recipes as unbounded. Adding limits (8 machines then 0 machines) does not resolve the issue. Factory shows Failed with unbounded simplex status. The maximize function cannot produce a valid production chain in this configuration.
